basic_details.job_title: Assam Pollution Control Board – Field Engineer – 2 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Assam Pollution Control Board (APCB) has recruited 2 Field Engineer posts. Candidates with B.E./B.Tech along with 2 to 3 years of relevant post-qualification experience can apply through email on or before 15 June 2026 through the APCB website, pcb.assam.gov.in.

qualification.education_qualification: B.E. / B. Tech. in Environmental Engineering / Civil Engineering / Chemical Engineering or equivalent discipline from a recognized university, Minimum 2 to 3 years of post-qualification work experience in the environmental field

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Assam Pollution Control Board Field Engineer Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
seo_tags: Assam Pollution Control Board Field Engineer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
